Here is an request from a humble mind ----- ALL POSTS should relate to 7 pm meeting tonight eg. share your tips for invite...

Do 3 things before 7:
1. invite
2. invite
3. invite


STOP POSTING EXCEPT for emergency ( people died/arrested)
( ask others to do the same thing on social media)


IF YOU ARE DEAD SERIOUS to FIGHT 4 FREEDOM:
GET off the screen , couch, bed....
GET OUT!!
INVITE !!!

Give yourself a tough time , don't post until you invited again and again:
1. 150-200 warm contacts and ask them do the same thing
2. your parents, siblings, relativesss ( u like or u hate),
3. teachers ( inc. those you hate!) , staff at school
4. any human beings at job including CEO
5. strangers on street - at least pass a flyer
6. hobbies' contacts - gymn, music, art, etc..

SAFETY: Make sure you know how your BIG group can EXIT safely IF all transportation close down. Asssume for the worst . Create 3 EXIT lan. Memorize your map and plan A,B, C routes.... Rehearse repeatedly in your brain !!!
